description: V1.5 private art remix loop folder, prompt, status, progress, blockers, and acceptance checklist exist.
evidence: Created docs/westeros-interactive-map/V1_5_ART_REMIX_LOOP_PROMPT.md and docs/westeros-interactive-map/loop-v1-5-art-remix/ with ACCEPTANCE_CHECKS.json, OPERATOR_STATUS.md, PROGRESS.md, and BLOCKERS.md.

description: Project constraints and docs index mention the V1.5 private art remix loop as the active art upgrade path.
evidence: Updated WESTEROS_INTERACTIVE_MAP_CONSTRAINTS.md and docs/westeros-interactive-map/README.md with V1.5 private art remix loop references and boundaries.

description: Private reference register exists and defines how official stills and network images are tracked.
evidence: Created docs/westeros-interactive-map/PRIVATE_REFERENCE_REGISTER.md with fields for local path/link, reference type, source party, use, derived asset, official-material flag, frontend use, scope, and risk notes.

description: Private raw reference directory is ignored by git and separated from public frontend assets.
evidence: apps/westeros-map/.gitignore includes private/westeros-reference/ and private/generated-working/ so raw official stills and intermediate generations stay out of tracked public assets.

description: Collect 20-40 private visual references across official stills, map language, architecture, weather, texture, and UI mood.
Generate an art direction contact sheet with at least 6 candidate directions for the Westeros sand-table map.
Generate or paint one high-fidelity global Westeros map base suitable for the current desktop layout.
Generate or paint a Winterfell local map asset that is more dimensional than the current SVG placeholder.
Generate or paint seven Winterfell event artworks for the required MVP events.
Generate weather and atmosphere textures for clouds, northern snow, and war smoke.
Replace the current global SVG placeholder with the selected high-fidelity generated/painterly map asset while preserving nodes and interactions.
Replace Winterfell event cards and local map with generated assets and preserve source/canon labels.
CMS/manifest metadata distinguishes private-prototype, public-ready-candidate, and blocked asset scopes.
All generated/repainted assets entering the frontend are listed in ASSET_MANIFEST.md with source chain and risk notes.
New 1440x900 and 1920x1080 screenshots show clear visual improvement over V1 placeholder screenshots.
lint, typecheck, unit tests, E2E tests, and production build pass after art asset replacement.
Public-ready cleanup report exists, listing which private-prototype assets must be replaced before any public launch.
